heading: Composition
label: 8901 Composition
text: The Naval Militia consists of the Naval Militia of the States, the District of Columbia, Guam, and the Virgin Islands.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7851.50 U.S.C. 1071, .July 9, 1952, ch. 608, § 50166 Stat. 500

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 7851 of this title2006— substituted “States, the District of Columbia, Guam, and the Virgin Islands” for “States, the Territories, and the District of Columbia”.Pub. L. 109–163

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
